_note: ILLUSTRATIVE — crude grade properties (API gravity, sulfur) are approximate public figures; the light_sweet/medium_sour/heavy_sour band and the flexibility_rules mapping are a SIMPLIFIED proxy for real refinery configuration (Nelson complexity, hydrotreating/coking capacity). NOT sourced from an authoritative dataset. 'type' is stored explicitly on each grade so grade_lookup stays a pure lookup (no threshold math at runtime). Calibrate before treating compatibility as real. Tracked in CLAUDE.md backlog. EXCEPTION: 'india_basket_blend' below is a REAL, sourced monthly datapoint — see its own '_source'.

india_basket_blend._source: PPAC (Petroleum Planning & Analysis Cell) — 'Crude Oil FOB Price (Indian Basket)' workbook, table posted 17.07.2026, period 2026-27. User-supplied file, verified 2026-07-19.
india_basket_blend.description: The Indian Basket is a derived blend of Sweet grade (Brent Dated) and Sour grade (Oman & Dubai average) actually imported by Indian refineries that month — the real sweet:sour split India is running, as opposed to the illustrative per-grade table below.
